brand_logo_emoji: drug testing,workplace compliance,B2B sales,DOT testing,DNA testing,owner-operator,banker hours,recession-resistant,low overhead
tagline: The only non-medical drug, alcohol, and DNA testing franchise in the US, delivering recurring B2B revenue through federally mandated workplace compliance with no medical license required.
description_short: Fastest Labs is a brick-and-mortar owner-operator franchise in the compliance-driven drug, alcohol, and DNA testing industry, built on recurring employer accounts and court-mandated testing demand. With 229 locations and 16 years of franchising history, it targets corporate-exit candidates who want M-F hours, low overhead, and a business with built-in repeat revenue tied to federal workplace mandates.
market_intelligence_insight: Global drug screening market reached $10.36 billion in 2025 and is projected to hit $21.29 billion by 2030 at a 15.5% CAGR; North America holds 48% of global market share; growth is driven by opioid crisis enforcement, DOT compliance mandates, and expanding employer workplace drug-free requirements.
item_19_headline: 165 franchised locations averaged $144599 gross revenue in 2024; locations open 3-plus years averaged $237121
